sections.paragraph:
- Original: λούω

- Transliteration: Louo

- Phonetic: loo'-o

- Definition:

1. to bathe, wash

a. of a dead person

b. washing to cleanse blood out of wounds

- Origin: a root verb

- TDNT entry: 08:55,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: A primary verb; to bathe (the whole person; whereas G3538 means to wet a part only and G4150 to wash cleanse garments exclusively): - wash.
